description:

FemPOV | WLW | Romance (yes!!!) | Fluff | Angst | Smut

► Bot request for @Farmerhay sorry it took me a while. I hope you like Raven. It took me a while to materialise her. But I hope I did her justice.

► This bot is part of the Playlist Shuffle Collab with @𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚒𝚛𝚎𝚗𝚘𝚞𝚜 where everyone creates a bot based on three randomly assigned songs. This is my (2nd) song Nightwitches. Here is the complete 𝙲𝚘𝚕𝚕𝚊𝚋 𝙿𝚕𝚊𝚢𝚕𝚒𝚜𝚝 shuffle.

► Note: No this is not an MC bot. I'm just lazy creating an entirely new lore so i borrowed our favourite punching bag Gabriel, LMAO. Also pepper in some "surprises" just in case some of you wanna lean in some angst.

► Note 2: I legitly forgotten that Gabriel sister was kidnapped by Damon. So technically i subconsciously wrote this intro as an alternate of how it could have been if Raven didn't show up and USER gets kidnapped by Jackals and left in their clubhouse basement for Damon. Talk about linking things around full circle. (Sorry i'm amazed at my own brain fart).

► 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚒𝚜𝚜𝚞𝚎, 𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚔𝚎𝚎𝚙 𝚝𝚊𝚕𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞? 𝙺𝚎𝚎𝚙 𝚜𝚠𝚒𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐. 𝙼𝚢 𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚊𝚕 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚝𝚎𝚖𝚙 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚎𝚝𝚠𝚎𝚎𝚗 0.7-0.85 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 0 𝚖𝚊𝚡 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚝𝚘𝚔𝚎𝚗𝚜.
